ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var txtLower = lower(vars.userText) --- if ((txtLower find "claim") != [] or (txtLower find "クレーム") != [] or (txtLower find "申し立て") != [] or (txtLower find "申立") != [] or (txtLower find "苦情") != [] or (txtLower find "complaint") != [] or (txtLower find "怒") != [] or (txtLower find "問題") != [] or (txtLower find "issue") != [] or (txtLower find "トラブル") != [] or (txtLower find "困っ") != [] or (txtLower find "助け") != []) "claim_intake" else if ((txtLower find "sla") != [] or (txtLower find "違反") != [] or (txtLower find "判定") != [] or (txtLower find "ペナルティ") != [] or (txtLower find "penalty") != [] or (txtLower find "契約") != [] or (txtLower find "compliance") != []) "sla_check" else "unknown"
%dw 2.0 output application/java var matches = vars.userText scan /A\d{3,}/ --- if (!isEmpty(matches)) (matches[0])[0] else null
%dw 2.0 output application/java var matches = vars.userText scan /C-\d+/ --- if (!isEmpty(matches)) (matches[0])[0] else null
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- vars.contractId default (if (vars.orderId == "A123") "C-001" else if (vars.orderId == "A124") "C-002" else if (vars.orderId == "A125") "C-001" else null)
